access.anon: Cannot view their own subscribed sections list.
access.user: Can only view and manage their own subscribed sections list.
access.admin: Does not view or edit other users' subscription lists through ordinary pages.
access.agent: Can read and manage the subscribed sections list data with the same semantics as the web through REST and MCP.

rules.grouped-by-semester: The list is grouped by semester rather than presented as a single flat list.
rules.retired-history: Existing subscription relationships to retired Sections remain visible in the owner's subscribed Sections list and can be removed. Retired Sections cannot be newly discovered or added and are omitted from current personal calendar events/feeds.
rules.section-codes-promoted: In the 'subscribed context', users manage specific section relationships, so section codes are intentionally promoted.
rules.sidebar-summary-only: The shell exposes one Section Subscriptions destination and an optional count badge; it must not mirror subscribed sections as dynamic child navigation.
rules.legacy-sections-route: /workspace/subscriptions/sections is a legacy redirect-only route to /workspace/subscriptions and must not expose page actions.

notes: Returns the current user's subscribed section details and personal subscription feed information; supports the subscribed sections list and personal calendar subscription entry.

fields.name: subscribedSections
notes: The Section item shape is identical to public Section list/detail results, and ownership is relation-derived.

tools.name: workspace_subscription_list
tools.returns: { success: Boolean, sections: Section[], note: String }
notes: Returns subscribed sections across all semesters, including past terms.

tools.name: workspace_calendar_feed_get
notes: Supplements calendarPath and calendarUrl on the same abstract entry.
Use full mode only when the caller explicitly needs the full subscribed section list on the same response.

fields: Row opens section subscription details and the available actions, including Unsubscribe
